Platform Capabilities

Everything you need to monitor performance remotely

Computer Vision

Real-time skeleton tracking and angle analysis for 6 major exercises. No calibration needed.

IoT Sensors

Sync with ESP32 wristbands for real-time Heart Rate (Pulse) and muscle activation (FSR) data.

Instant Sessions

Zero setup. Generate a 6-character code and invite your athlete instantly.

AI Performance Reports

Automated summaries after every session highlighting form improvements and key metrics.

Ready to modernize your coaching?

Join FitMon today and give your athletes the professional remote monitoring experience they deserve.

Get Started Free
